general_provisions: This bill amends provisions related to pharmacy benefits.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>amends provisions related to drug maximum allowable cost, including regarding lists, appeals, and claims;<hr><ltbullet>specifies penalties; and<hr><ltbullet>provides the Insurance Department rulemaking authority.
